description: Douglas-Peucker simplification of a geometry column — reduce vertex count for plotting / tiling / faster joins. Drop-in for Alteryx's Generalize tool.

outputs.description: Same columns; geometry is simplified in place

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream asset key providing a (Geo)DataFrame with a geometry column

tolerance.label: Tolerance
tolerance.description: Simplification tolerance, in the CRS's units

preserve_topology.label: Preserve Topology
preserve_topology.description: Keep the simplified geometry valid (no self-intersections)
